title: Exactly Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The provided code does not fully implement the requirements of the Exactly Bug Bounty, particularly the autonomous fixed and variable interest rate market and the DeFi credit market functionalities. The code only provides basic deposit and withdrawal functionalities without any interest rate mechanisms or credit market features.
audit.improvements: To meet the requirements, the code should include implementations for fixed and variable interest rate calculations, credit market functionalities, and other DeFi-related features such as loans, collateral management, and risk assessment mechanisms.
